impact: This advances checkbox-185 by validating the daemon diagnostic shape needed for blocked-task non-JSON LLM parse loops without touching DevHub, crawler, extraction, logic, or fixture contracts.
summary: Add a narrow parser-clean Python unittest for blocked-task LLM parse-loop diagnostics.
target_task: Task checkbox-185: Add parser-clean daemon diagnostics validation for blocked-task LLM parse loops using one small Python unittest or one daemon helper only; do not touch DevHub, crawler, extraction, logic, or domain fixture contracts in this cycle.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
